title: Artificial Cherry Blossom Flowers, 3 Pcs Faux Cherry Blossom Stems Faux Silk Peach Flower Branches 104CM/ 41" Fake Flowers Long Stems for Vase Arrangements Wedding Table Garden Home Decor, Pink
features: MATERIAL: This artificial cherry blossom is handcrafted and made of silk, the petals are all naturally curled; the color is beautiful, the appearance is lifelike, and it feels real to the touch. We pay attention to details, so in the branch part, it also imitates the real tree branch, to the point of being real

SIZE: The cherry blossoms overall length is about 41 inches/ 104cm. suitable for floor standing medium and tall vases. Each has 4 stems. The flowers are very lush and the stems are lined with durable wire. You can bend the stems or cut them to other lengths

Widely Suitable: The artificial cherry blossom flower branches for indoor or outdoor decoration. Whether you are hosting a special event such as a wedding, anniversary or birthday party, or for decorating your home's living room, bedroom, or kitchen island. This 3-packs of cherry blossoms is the perfect choice for you

Tips: After unpacking, in order to make the fake cherry blossoms fluffy, you can fiddle with the stems to make them plump. Due to long-term transportation, the flowers may fall off, please don't worry, the flowers can be easily installed on; To ensure the cherry blossoms present the best condition. Please straighten the stems to fit the original shape of the vase

PACKAGE: The package has 3 faux silk cherry blossom branches bend in a circle(no vase included) packed in a box, please take them out carefully. Then adjust the branch and separate each stem into original shape.
